The Color Purple (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $60,619,191Details
International Box Office $8,300,000
Worldwide Box Office $68,919,191
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $676,383
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $385,640
Total $1,062,023
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A decades-spanning tale of one woman’s journey to independence. Celie faces many hardships in her life, but ultimately finds extraordinary strength and hope in the unbreakable bonds of sisterhood.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,737,072 (19.4% of total gross)
Legs:5.16 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:88.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,203 opening theaters/3,218 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $65,678,400

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2023 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: December 20th, 2023 (Wide), released as The Color Purple (Цвет лиловый) (Russia (CIS))
January 18th, 2024 (Wide), released as Farven Iilla (Denmark)
January 19th, 2024 (Wide), released as Purpurfärgen (Sweden)
January 19th, 2024 (Wide) (Norway)
January 19th, 2024 (Wide), released as Häivähdys Purppuraa (Finland)
Video Release: January 16th, 2024 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for mature thematic content, sexual content, violence and language.
(Rating bulletin 2807 (cert #54371), 11/1/2023)
Running Time: 140 minutes
Franchise: The Color Purple
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Georgia, United States
Plot point: African Americans, Coming of Age
Subgenre: Epic Musical
Source:Based on Musical or Opera
Genre:Musical
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., Domain Entertainment, Amblin Entertainment, OW Films , SGS Pictures, QJP
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
